2605.12288.title: TokenRatio: Principled Token-Level Preference Optimization via Ratio Matching
2605.12288.paper_summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is a widely used RL-free method for aligning language models from pairwise preferences, but it models preferences over full sequences even though generation is driven by per-token decisions. Existing token-level extensions typically decompose a sequence-level Bradley-Terry objective across timesteps, leaving per-prefix (state-wise) optimality implicit. We study how to recover token-level preference optimality using only standard sequence-level pairwise comparisons. We introduce Token-level Bregman Preference Optimization (TBPO), which posits a token-level Bradley-Terry preference model over next-token actions conditioned on the prefix, and derive a Bregman-divergence density-ratio matching objective that generalizes the logistic/DPO loss while preserving the optimal policy induced by the token-level model and maintaining DPO-like simplicity. We introduce two instantiations: TBPO-Q, which explicitly learns a lightweight state baseline, and TBPO-A, which removes the baseline through advantage normalization. Across instruction following, helpfulness/harmlessness, and summarization benchmarks, TBPO improves alignment quality and training stability and increases output diversity relative to strong sequence-level and token-level baselines.
2605.12288.paper_summary_zh: 直接偏好優化（DPO）是一種廣泛使用的無強化學習方法，用於根據成對偏好對語言模型進行對齊，但它對完整序列建模偏好，即使生成是由每個標記的決策驅動。現有的標記級擴展通常在時間步長上分解序列級Bradley-Terry目標，從而使每個前綴（狀態級）最優性隱含。我們研究如何僅使用標準序列級成對比較來恢復標記級偏好最優性。我們引入標記級Bregman偏好優化（TBPO），該方法假設一個基於前綴條件的標記級Bradley-Terry偏好模型，並推導出一個Bregman散度密度比匹配目標，該目標在保留由標記級模型誘導的最優策略的同時，概括了邏輯/DPO損失並保持DPO類似的簡單性。我們介紹了兩個具體實現：TBPO-Q，該方法明確學習一個輕量級狀態基線，以及TBPO-A，該方法通過優勢正規化來去除基線。在指令遵循、有用性/無害性和摘要基準測試中，TBPO提高了對齊質量和訓練穩定性，並相對於強大的序列級和標記級基線增加了輸出多樣性。
2605.12288.author: Truong Nguyen et.al.
2605.12288.authors: Truong Nguyen, Tien-Phat Nguyen, Linh Ngo Van, Duy Minh Ho Nguyen, Khoa Doan, Trung Le
